title: Kimi ni Somaru Monochrome
titleRomaji: Kimi ni Somaru Monochrome
titleNative: 君に染まるモノクローム
synonyms: Monocromo teñido de ti
synopsis: Hajime Haibara is a boy whose first love has faded away. A mysterious senior student, Bikyu, appears in front of him and invites him into a "new world". Hajime falls in love with Bikyu while being pushed around by her!

title: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleRomaji: Kaii-bu: M-ken Y-shi no Kaigenshou ni Tsuite
titleNative: 怪異部～M県Y市の怪現象について～
synopsis: When transfer student Sakura Sakuraba arrives in Yuuyamichou, she discovers a place steeped in bizarre, ancient customs. The children there all have strange names and are bound by a curse that prevents them from leaving the city until they graduate high school. Caught in an escalating nightmare, Sakura must navigate curses, summonings, and betrayals. To break the curse and free the children, Sakura teams up with Uzu Andou, the mysterious president of the Paranormal Club. Their strange "club activities" are about to begin! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
titleRomaji: Tanaka ke, Tensei Suru.
titleNative: 田中家、転生する。
synonyms: The Tanaka Family Reincarnated.
The Tanaka Family Reincarnates.
synopsis: An ordinary family that loves cats. One day, the whole Tanaka family died during a major earthquake. When they woke up, they were reincarnated as the Stuart family, a noble family from another world. Though everyone is dressed in the Western style, they have memories of their previous Japanese lives. Even though they’re confused, they’ve gotten used to living in another world.

synopsis: Taking place on the planet Efinea, Tales of Graces f centers on Asbel Lhant as he seeks the strength to protect those he holds dear. Along with his childhood friends and the mysterious and innocent Sophie, he must explore the bonds of friendship as they find themselves drawn into the conflict between three kingdoms competing for dominance of the planet. (Source: Namco Bandai Games)

titleRomaji: Kahan no Machi no Celine
titleNative: 河畔の町のセリーヌ
synonyms: Céline, une ville fluviale
Céline, une vie parisienne
synopsis: 19th-century France, Paris. Celine, a girl who seems like she's come from the moon, is 14 years old and lacks dreams and ambitions. She doesn't even know what she wants to do with her life. After moving to the city, she coincidentally meets an old gentleman who recommends her to try job experiences. Will she be able to find herself in the transforming city of Paris?

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

Yuzu was hoping to take advantage of entering high school to transform herself and become more fashionable. But she wasn't having any success on her own, so she asks Rika, her idol, to be her fashion guru. However... (Source: Amazon.jp, translated)

title: Oishinbo
titleRomaji: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)
synonyms: The Gourmet

title: Kui-tan
titleRomaji: Kui-tan
titleNative: 喰いタン
synopsis: "Holmes Agency" is a private detective office known as the "Big-Eating" Detective Office. Seiya Takano, who is known for have a huge appetite, gets assigned to this office as the new leader. Ryosuke Noda and Ryoko Izumi, both also having a big appetite work under Seiya. Murder, robbery, and kidnapping—many incidents occur around them. And the three solve each of the many cases in a most surprising way—their appetite results in marvelous speculations! They eat at themurder scene. They eat on the track. They even eat dog food! They keep on eating and eating, not even listening to the witness. Everywhere they go, they eat and eat and eat! And every time after finishing, the criminal appears. KUITAN is the words "Big-Eating" and Detective combined together. "Real Gourmet" plus "Real Mystery." The big-eating detectives are on the run, solving cases from their deep knowledge about food.
synonyms: Kuitan
Kui Tan
The Case Files of the Gourmand Detective

titleNative: くらいあの子としたいこと
synonyms: 想與陰暗的她一起做的事
synopsis: Starting his second year of high school, Ren Tabata was determined to get over his loner past and make some new friends. The first person he approached was the girl next to him, Touko Sasaki, who seemed gloomy and a little intimidating at first, but he couldn't seem to take his eyes off her. A romantic comedy between two shy but cute people who don't want to be alone anymore! (Source: DoraDora Sharp#, translated)

title: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleNative: 辺境ぐらしの魔王、転生して最強の魔術師になる
synonyms: The Demon King of the Frontier Life, Reincarnated To Become the Strongest Mage ~The Former Demon King Who Grows up While Being Loved, Wants To Know Humans~
synopsis: There was a mage called "The Lone Demon King" at the frontier. He was just a creature that never grew old, but he was loved by the villagers as something of a guardian deity. However, he was destroyed by a magic organization that sees his existence as dangerous. 200 years later, he is reincarnated as the second son of an aristocrat and obtains the strongest magic power. "Let's pretend to be a human this time..." However, being a human lover, he didn't particularly think of revenge and has decided to pretend to be human in this life. In his past life, he was the guardian deity of a region, and in this life, he's a local aristocrat, but he does not know common sense. He doesn't know how to take it easy. As the second son of an aristocrat, he is loved by his family and friends, and while he is regarded as a master of magic in the magic guild, he becomes an "Immortal Mage" behind the scenes. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

synonyms: Garbage Hero: A Revenge Story of a Hero Who Got Summoned to Another World
Garbage Brave Revenge story of a hero summoned and discarded in another world
synopsis: While on a regular school day, Tsukuru along with his classmates got transported to another world. However, at the other side of the summoning there was a hero's auction, where each nation would bid for the heroes to defeat the demon kings of each territories. While his classmates received cheat jobs and got auctioned quickly Tsukuru got the useless job "Chef." As no nation bid for him, he got thrown out through a transfer gate. At the other side of the gate was a territory dominated by strong monsters... (Source: Hifumi Shobo, translated)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleRomaji: Mimi no Kaidan
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Mimi's Ghost Stories
Contos de Horror da Mimi
Les cauchemars de Mimi
Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)
